name: Rollitos De Jaiba- Crab Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake the crab meat and remove any bones.
2. In a bowl, combine egg, tomato juice, bread crumbs, salt, chili powder, prepared mustard, and chopped parsley.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 hours.
4. Form the chilled mixture into finger-sized pieces.
5. Place the pieces on a broiler pan and broil at a distance of 6 inches from the heat source for 5 minutes on each side.
6. Serve with toothpicks. Makes about 2 dozen rolls.
